\tzpentry{ID4801}{Field Strength Tensor Coupling}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4801 introduces Field Strength Tensor Coupling as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\t\\frac{d\\mathbf{x}}{dt} = \\mathbf{F}(\\mathbf{x}) + \\sigma \\mathbf{G}(\\text{emotion}) \\otimes \\mathcal{T}_{\\pi, \\phi_c}\n\\end{equation}
